title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: Satellite 6.16.6 Async Update
overview: An update for Satellite is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description:
Red Hat Satellite is a system management solution that allows organizations to configure and maintain their systems without the necessity to provide public Internet access to their servers or other client systems. It performs provisioning and configuration management of predefined standard operating environments.Bug Fix(es): Can't register systems with bond interface named bond-<something> AND a tagged vlan on the same interface (SAT-40670)  Repetitive recalculation of Katello::RepositoryTypeManager.enabled_repository_types makes katello:correct_repositories very slow (SAT-41005)  ERROR: nextval: reached maximum value of sequence "katello_erratum_packages_id_seq" during concurrent repository sync plan executions (SAT-41007)  Can't delete hosts due to type null host statuses (SAT-41008) 
Users of Red Hat Satellite are advised to upgrade to these updated packages, which fix these bugs.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: Can't register systems with bond interface named bond-<something> AND a tagged vlan on the same interface
Repetitive recalculation of Katello::RepositoryTypeManager.enabled_repository_types makes katello:correct_repositories very slow
ERROR:  nextval: reached maximum value of sequence "katello_erratum_packages_id_seq"  during concurrent repository sync plan executions
Can't delete hosts due to type null host statuses

full_text:
An update for Satellite is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Red Hat Satellite is a system management solution that allows organizations to configure and maintain their systems without the necessity to provide public Internet access to their servers or other client systems. It performs provisioning and configuration management of predefined standard operating environments.Bug Fix(es): Can't register systems with bond interface named bond-<something> AND a tagged vlan on the same interface (SAT-40670)  Repetitive recalculation of Katello::RepositoryTypeManager.enabled_repository_types makes katello:correct_repositories very slow (SAT-41005)  ERROR: nextval: reached maximum value of sequence "katello_erratum_packages_id_seq" during concurrent repository sync plan executions (SAT-41007)  Can't delete hosts due to type null host statuses (SAT-41008) 
Users of Red Hat Satellite are advised to upgrade to these updated packages, which fix these bugs.
